name: material-takeoff
description: Material Takeoff: maps a project scope + size to an order-ready material quantity list. Sibling to House Intelligence in the same repo (same engine pattern + HTTP stack, separate service). v1: kitchen remodel.

scripts.test: node test_engine.js && node test_bathroom.js && node test_room_shape.js && node test_pack_size.js && node test_pricing.js && node test_rate_limit.js && node test_server.js
